package.name: rena_cuvslam_ros
package.description: C++ cuVSLAM RGB-D odometry node for the base OAK camera(s). Drives the rena cuVSLAM C++ API (cuvslam2.h, multi-depth ICP) directly — no Python wrapper — so DDS is drained at full camera rate and frames reach Track() at a constant 30 fps. Drop-in replacement for the previous Python rena_cuvslam_ros node.
